/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/appMyApp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/appMyApp.dir/appMyApp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appMyApp.dir/main.cpp.o
